Home.tagline: A nomadic photo and video production studio.
Home.sub: The photographer or videographer matched to your project, anywhere in the world.

Footer.tagline: A nomadic photo and video production studio. Matchmaking anywhere in the world.

meta.title: The Service — Admara Studio
meta.description: The photographer or videographer matched to your project, anywhere in the world. Free Discovery Call, mission order and moodboard prepared by ADMARA.

hero.title: The photographer or videographer matched to your project.
hero.sub: Anywhere in the world. ADMARA handles sourcing, briefing, coordination and delivery.

audiences.title: For every visual project.
audiences.intro: ADMARA serves a brand preparing a campaign as well as a creator looking for a signature series or an individual wanting cadred coverage of a life moment.

professional.label: Professional
professional.title: Brands, agencies, independents.
professional.body: Campaigns, product launches, recurring content. ADMARA frames the intent and coordinates execution.

creative.label: Creative
creative.title: Series, portfolios, editorials.
creative.body: Creators, personal brands, publications. Art direction is set in writing before the shoot.

personal.label: Personal
personal.title: Weddings, events, structured portraits.
personal.body: Moments that deserve a framed production. ADMARA treats every mission like a pro project, with a photographer chosen for their eye.

howItWorks.title: Five steps, no grey areas.
howItWorks.intro: The Discovery Call and mission order writing are free. No payment is requested before the quote sent by Alyssia is signed off.

discovery.title: Discovery Call
discovery.body: Fifteen to thirty minutes with Alyssia to understand the project, intent and context.

mission_order.title: Mission order
mission_order.body: ADMARA writes the framing document and the moodboard. Objective, deliverables, location, dates, style.

submission.title: Talent selection
submission.body: The mission is submitted to the ADMARA network. A photographer or videographer accepts based on your brief.

coordination.title: Coordination
coordination.body: ADMARA runs logistics, scouting, casting, payment and briefs through to shoot day.

delivery.title: Delivery + support
delivery.body: Delivery on the timeline written into the quote. After-sales support is included.

whyUs.title: A written method, not an opportunistic freelancer.

selection.title: Open selection
selection.body: Worldwide network recruited one by one on portfolio and interview.

order.title: Framed mission order
order.body: Written document sent before every shoot. No ambiguity.

moodboard.title: Moodboard
moodboard.body: Art direction prepared in writing and visuals for the photographer.

coordination.title: Integrated logistics
coordination.body: Scouting, permits, casting, payment, after-sales. ADMARA carries the coordination.

cta.title: Describe your project.
cta.sub: A few short questions to frame your brief, then you book your Discovery Call.
cta.reassurance: Free Discovery Call. No data sold. European GDPR.

agent.initial_prompt: Hello. I'm ADMARA's digital concierge. A few short questions to frame your project. Is your project professional, creative or personal?
agent.confirmation: We have received your request. Book your call to be contacted.

fallback.intro: The concierge isn't available right now. You can book a Discovery Call directly or write to Alyssia.

meta.title: ADMARA — a studio opening up
meta.description: ADMARA Studio. A photo and video production studio opening its doors. Two founders, a method, a prototype-assumed posture.

hero.title: A studio opening up.
hero.sub: Two founders. A method. A prototype-assumed posture.

why.title: ADMARA exists to make photo and video production legible again.
why.p1: Most visual projects fail at the same spot: a fuzzy brief. The client has an intent, the photographer has a craft, and no one translates one into the other.
why.p2: ADMARA plays that translator role. We collect the project, write a framed mission order, prepare a usable moodboard, and submit the mission to a photographer or videographer curated from our worldwide network.
why.p3: We are starting out. We are two. We build in transparency with our first clients and our first photographers — without claiming a ten-year track record we don't have.

aurelien.name: Aurélien Belières
aurelien.bio: Aurélien leads ADMARA's technology and operations: platform, internal tooling, AI agents, automation. He ensures every mission is tracked, delivered and invoiced without friction.

alyssia.name: Alyssia
alyssia.role: Co-founder — Art direction and client relations
alyssia.bio: Alyssia runs the Discovery Call, writes the mission order and the moodboard, and selects the right photographer or videographer. She is the client's single point of contact end-to-end.

method.title: Four pillars, no mystery.
method.intro: ADMARA builds every production on four stable pillars. These pillars are what separates a framed engagement from an improvised shoot.

selection.title: Open selection
selection.body: Worldwide network of photographers and videographers, recruited one by one on portfolio and interview. No automated catalogue.

order.title: Mission order
order.body: Written document sent before every shoot. Objective, deliverables, location, dates, usage rights: all written down.

moodboard.title: Moodboard
moodboard.body: Art direction prepared in writing and in visuals. The photographer arrives with the right frame and the right intent.

coordination.title: Integrated coordination
coordination.body: Scouting, permits, casting, payment, after-sales. ADMARA carries the logistics so the client can focus on the project.

cta.title: Got a project in mind?
cta.sub: Describe it in a few short questions and we'll frame the next steps together.
